title: Vanity: Core
description: Apply any look you want to your items, and make your own Vanity Packs to share with the world.
body:
# Vanity, a way to customize your items

Vanity allows players to create custom skins for any item they choose! Driven by data and resource packs, Vanity allows you to make your own packs which include "Designs" that can be used in a Styling Table to apply a custom skin to an item defined in the data pack.

## How to customize your items
To customize your items, you'll need a Styling Table - Crafted with four planks and two Leather. Insert your items in there, and the styles available will depend on the [Vanity Packs](https://modrinth.com/collection/73AV5TYv) you have downloaded, and the Designs you currently have placed inside the Styling Table.

## Vanity Packs
To make a Vanity Pack, you should check out pre-existing ones, or even better, use our [Template Vanity Pack](https://github.com/Farcr/vanity/tree/1.20.x/example_pack).
To check out existing Vanity Packs, check out the [Vanity Gallery](https://modrinth.com/collection/73AV5TYv), where all vanity packs get added on request of their authors.

If you're looking for a place to discuss Vanity Pack creation, or want to meet the Vanity community, then [Join my Discord](https://discord.gg/JW4utPut9x)
